query:
SELECT 
  id,
  section,
  entity,
  status,
  triggered_by,
  started_at,
  finished_at,
  TIMESTAMPDIFF(SECOND, started_at, finished_at) as duration_secs,
  row_count,
  error_message
FROM sync_logs
WHERE section = 'Boonphone'
ORDER BY started_at DESC
LIMIT 20;
command:

  triggered_by,
  started_at,
  finished_at,

  row_count,

ORDER BY started_at DESC
